textPlain: > To streamline the process while maintaining quality, we built our own internal evaluation tool: a Git-style diff viewer with annotation tools for categorizing merge outcomes.vibecoding internal eval tools is the single best use case of ai accelerating ai i know of! nice to see(sorry if this gets asked a lot) - any philsophical/methodology differences to MorphLLM that you'd call out since you seem to be a direct alternative?
